name: table-cells-checkbox
description: A table cell wrapper (<td>) that renders a single klp Checkbox instance. Two height variants (height=1 compact 48px, height=2 default 56px) and two width variants (48px fixed, default fluid). Supports controlled, uncontrolled, indeterminate, and disabled checkbox states.
